policy.canonical_json: UTF-8; sorted keys; compact separators; no NaN/infinity
policy.digest_construction: ASCII domain + NUL + canonical JSON bytes

residual: Preregister executable, provider, environment, resource, attempt, completion, and retry identities before executing a child shard.
Execute official child shards and retain complete or explicitly incomplete raw evidence without converting official outcomes into native parity credit.
